input: user check-in sequences and POI attributes (geographic coordinates, transition patterns)
output: ranked list of next POIs for a user
backbone: hybrid Transformer-LSTM encoder-decoder with gated graph neural network and location-aware attention
loss: local perturbation-based contrastive loss + global cross-view contrastive loss + (implicit) sequential prediction loss
key_idea: multi-graph modeling (geospatial and trajectory graphs) with multi-granularity contrastive learning (local perturbation and global cross-view) to capture high-order transitions and multi-source semantics
datasets: two real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
